title: Christspiracy
overview: The moral dimension of humanity's interaction with nonhuman animals and the industries that profit from their exploitation, as informed by world religions. A historical explanation of how the current global situation came to be.

trailers.title: Film Director Kip Andersen discusses his new documentary "Christspiracy" | Free Speech Nation
